title: Telemetry Event
description: Canonical schema for a single telemetry event emitted by Claude Code hooks, skills, and subagents. One event per NDJSON line. Versioned via schemaVersion (SemVer). See EPIC-0040 / story-0040-0001.

schemaVersion.description: SemVer version of this event schema. MAJOR bumps on breaking change, MINOR on new optional field, PATCH on docs-only.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.<1-9 digits>Z). Fractional seconds are optional and, when present, must contain 1 to 9 digits.

sessionId.description: Opaque identifier of the Claude Code session that produced the event.

epicId.description: Epic identifier (EPIC-NNNN) or literal 'unknown' when unattributable.

storyId.description: Story identifier in canonical form story-XXXX-YYYY.

taskId.description: Task identifier in canonical form TASK-XXXX-YYYY-NNN.

type.description: Discrete event kind. Closed enum; adding a value requires a MINOR bump.

phase.description: Free-form phase label, bounded to avoid log bloat.

tool.description: Canonical Claude Code tool name (e.g., Bash, Read, Skill).

durationMs.description: Non-negative duration in milliseconds for terminal events (*.end, tool.result).

status.description: Terminal outcome flag for end-style events.

failureReason.description: Short, scrubbed description of the failure. Secrets must be redacted before emission.

metadata.description: Whitelisted structured attributes. Permitted keys are defined in RULE-003 of EPIC-0040 and enforced at write-time by hooks.
